sorry_locations.notes: WrapAngle: 6 rational wrap theorems need Mathlib floor arithmetic (Int.fract, Int.floor_nonneg). All other 19 files are sorry-free.

bugs_found.description: NaN safety violation in signNoZero<float> — returns 0 for NaN, violating ne_zero contract
negate<int16_t> involution error — INT16_MAX special case incorrect, negate(negate(-32767))=-32768

targets.name: Crc16Fold
targets.notes: buffer_crc16 fold/split property. crc16_append: streaming CRC correctness proved via List.foldl_append.

targets.name: Atmosphere
targets.notes: ISA standard atmosphere model. density_mono_temp: needs inv_lt_inv from Mathlib. Planned but not yet started formally.
targets.note: atmosphere_informal.md written: getDensityFromPressureAndTemp (ideal gas), getStandardTemperatureAtAltitude (ISA lapse), getPressureFromAltitude and getAltitudeFromPressure (deferred, need Mathlib rpow)

targets.name: CommanderArmingFSM
targets.notes: Binary DISARMED/ARMED FSM. arm()/disarm() quasi-pure. 10 target theorems planned. FV approach: ArmState inductive, boolean condition abstraction, proofs by decide/cases. Next: write Lean spec (Task 3).

discoveries: density_mono_temp sorry: Rat.inv_lt_inv_of_lt does not exist in stdlib v4.29.0; needs Mathlib.Algebra.Order.Field.Basic
Lean neg literal normalization: -27315/100 internally becomes -5463/20 (harmless for native_decide)
Rat.lt_iff_sub_pos: requires explicit args (a b), cannot use .mp directly from the lemma name
Rat.add_lt_add_right adds on right; for left-add use calc with Rat.add_comm
Rat.neg_mul exists; bare neg_mul does not in root namespace
Commander FSM uses Hysteresis for auto-disarm; Hysteresis.lean already covers this sub-component
Sea-level density from ISA: ~1.2249 kg/m3 (Lean exact) vs 1.225f (C++ constant) — minor rounding discrepancy in source code itself
crc16_append proof: List.foldl_append + simp/simp only closes all goals in one step
WrapAngle sorry: 6 theorem bodies use sorry (rational wrap, floor-dependent); integer wrap (wrapInt) is fully proved

paper_status.pdf_note: LaTeX unavailable (sudo blocked in CI). paper.tex is correct and compiles when LaTeX is available.

notes: Run 54: Tasks 10+11 selected. Updated paper.tex (Crc16Fold in table, 259 theorems, 20 modules, title fix 'Zero Sorry'→'6 Sorry', new CRC paragraph, tcolorbox package) and REPORT.md (run54 timeline entry). No new Lean files added. Next targets: CommanderArmingFSM (Task 3) and Atmosphere.lean (Task 3/4). Both need Lean spec work. WrapAngle sorry still blocked on Mathlib floor.
